summary: 実装契約は確認済み。AC-9、39 changed-path inspection、main E2E、path-surface、failure-mode、empty fail-closed、CLI契約はいずれも通過した。一方、review開始前のpr-prepareが後続evidenceより古く、このreview自身の未記録状態を含むため、current-head prepare再生成後の独立preflightを要求する。
confirmed: all 39 required inspection inputs exist and current E2E targets all 39
findings: pr-prepare snapshot predates the latest verification evidence
the missing current preflight record is circular for the reviewer whose output creates that record
scope judgment remains a downstream PR-readiness concern rather than an implementation-contract defect
